name: tiered_psychology_drift
description: Observe emotional/psychology drift in tiered bots under sustained HU pressure. Contrast a low-poise volatile character (Queen of Hearts) against a high-poise stable one (Sherlock Holmes). Both run with Layer 1+2+3 active + enable_psychology=true so pressure_detector and zone effects fire.
hypothesis: Queen of Hearts (poise=0.25) will accumulate zone penalties and trip into non-composed emotional states (tilted/overconfident/shaken) under pressure. Sherlock Holmes (poise=0.85) stays composed throughout. When Queen of Hearts shifts, her modified_strategy distortion direction follows the emotional bias (aggressive if tilted/overconfident, passive if shaken) gated by (1 - poise) = 0.75 strength.
